function.message: No recorded message from NORA was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in 99_system and 60_outbox/channels, then checked all channel logs as instructed by task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/nora.md identifies NORA alias as nora. Exhaustive reads of every transcript file in 60_outbox/channels found no message with author/author_id matching Nora or nora; some files had no messages at all. Therefore the requested quote cannot be derived from available records.
